Astral Watcher Orb

Once in a while, the unit deals 800000 magic damage to 3 random enemy units (preferred target: mage), steals 25% of all stats from them for 5 sec., and disarms them for 5 sec. For that duration, disarmed enemy units cannot use the weapon's abilities.

Requirements: 98-100
